steps.title: Use the contrast with many
steps.content: The word though contrasts the many studies of high-altitude effects with the state of research on below-sea-level locations. The blank must describe a scarcity of such studies.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A suggests a dispute. Choice C means an abundance, which repeats rather than contrasts with many. Choice D means the appearance of truth. The needed phrase means a lack or scarcity. The answer is B.
